title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q3 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Marvell Technology, a networking chips designer, is reporting Q3 earnings after market close on December 3, 2024. The company exceeded analyst revenue projections by 1.5% in the previous quarter, posting $1.27 billion in revenues (down 5.1% year-over-year). The quarter demonstrated strong inventory improvements and a significant EPS beat. Analysts anticipate revenue growth of 2.7% year-over-year to approximately $1.46 billion, representing a recovery from the 7.7% decline in the prior-year quarter. Expected adjusted earnings per share are projected at $0.41. Covering analysts have reaffirmed recent estimates, suggesting stability in their outlook. The company has missed Wall Street's revenue targets twice over the past two years. Related semiconductor manufacturers showed mixed results—Teradyne delivered 4.8% revenue growth while Semtech reported 17.9% growth, both beating expectations. Marvell's shares have appreciated 10.2% over the past month, trading near $92.99 versus an average analyst price target of $96.79.
